identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Godly Light' minimalist dashboard that feels breathable, professional, and human.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with Soft Utility warmth.
Emotion First: The user should feel 'Calm Control'.
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage.
Negative Space: Aggressive whitespace usage (2-3x normal).
Contrast: High contrast text for readability, subtle borders for structure.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and major metrics.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, table data, and inputs.

mono.usage: Use for financial figures, dates, and IDs.

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Public+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');

sidebar.style: border-r border-slate-100 bg-white h-screen sticky top-0

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white shadow-sm hover:shadow transition-all rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 transition-all rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

inputs.style: border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-lg bg-white shadow-sm

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

home_hero.usage: Use as a subtle banner or welcome card background in the Home section.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. ROUTING: Use 'react-router-dom' for navigation between Home, Budgets, and Calendar.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout' component with a Sidebar (Left) and Main Content Area (Right).
4. HOME: Create a dashboard overview with quick links and a summary of pending budgets/upcoming events.
5. BUDGETS: Implement a data table with filtering (by status). Use a Dialog for Create/Edit. Store data in localStorage or mock state.
6. CALENDAR: Use 'react-day-picker' or a custom grid. Allow clicking a day to add an event. Show events as small dots or bars on the day cell.
7. THEME: Enforce the 'Godly Light' theme. No dark mode toggle needed (as per requirements).
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text meets contrast ratios. Use semantic HTML.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid white or very subtle gray.
Use 2-3x more padding than you think is necessary.
All interactive elements must have a hover state.
